question: What does help Calvin stay connected to the creative process?
ground_truth: Calvin stays connected to the creative process by always staying up-to-date on world events and watching documentaries about artists.
system_answer: Calvin stays connected to the creative process by trying out new sounds in his music studio, attending networking events to meet other artists, and collaborating with young musicians. Positive feedback from his album and inspiring conversations with other artists also motivate him.
